documents.name: Article meta document
documents.description: Document used to store background information on an article

block.name: Subject
block.description: A subject for the content, this is primarily something that will be added by automated systems, but can be manipulated by end users as well.

confidence.description: the confidence the automated system had in tagging this entity

status.description: Lifecycle stage of the link, rejected/accepted can be used to provide training feedback to automated systems.

manually-added.description: Should be used when a user manually adds something that the automatic systems missed.

block.name: Suggested subject
block.description: A suggested subject, this is primarily something that will be added by automated systems, but can be manipulated by end users as well.

confidence.description: the confidence the automated system had in tagging this entity

status.description: Lifecycle stage of the link, rejected/accepted can be used to provide training feedback to automated systems.
